list.title: DoboMysql#sanitizeError
list.description: Sanitizes MySQL errors and adds a details property to the error object if possible.

list.title: DoboMysqlDriver#support.returning
list.description: Override the default behavior of returning inserted rows on insert queries. MySQL does not support this feature.

list.title: factory
list.description:
Plugin factory.

Never call this function directly!!! It's only-meant to be called by the {@link https://ardhi.github.io/bajo|Bajo framework} during plugin initialization.
